name: Quicksilver Student Cash Rewards Credit Card
perks: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on every purchase, no categories to track
$50 cash bonus after spending $100 in the first 3 months
Automatic consideration for a higher credit limit after 6 months of on-time payments
Lock your card if it's misplaced
No penalty APR for late payments
drawbacks: Only 1.5% flat rate with no elevated categories
Requires being a student at an accredited US college or university
Limited credit history required (not truly no-credit)
